name: Adopt
summary: Adopt or enroll urirun nodes into a managed host.
description: Adopt is an if-uri urirun connector for adopt or enroll urirun nodes into a managed host. It is represented in the public catalog so the connector can be discovered, versioned and linked to its repository while implementation details are completed.
useCases: Discover Adopt capabilities from the connector catalog.
Plan flows that use adopt:// URI routes.
Install or track the connector from its GitHub repository.
